2604.24302.title: Differentiable Faithfulness Alignment for Cross-Model Circuit Transfer
2604.24302.paper_summary: Mechanistic interpretability has made it possible to localize circuits underlying specific behaviors in language models, but existing methods are expensive, model-specific, and difficult to scale to larger architectures. We introduce \textbf{Differentiable Faithfulness Alignment (DFA)}, a framework that transfers circuit information from a smaller source model to a larger target model through a learned differentiable alignment. DFA projects source-model node importance scores into the target model and trains this mapping with a soft faithfulness objective, avoiding full circuit discovery on the target model. We evaluate DFA on Llama-3 and Qwen-2.5 across six tasks spanning factual retrieval, multiple-choice reasoning, and arithmetic. The strongest results occur on Llama-3 $1$B$\rightarrow3$B, where aligned circuits are often competitive with direct node attribution and zero-shot transfer remains effective. Recovery weakens for larger source--target gaps and is substantially lower on Qwen-2.5, suggesting that transfer becomes harder as architectural and scaling differences increase. Overall, DFA consistently outperforms simple baselines and, in some settings, recovers target-model circuits with faithfulness comparable to or stronger than direct attribution. These results suggest that smaller models can provide useful mechanistic priors for larger ones, while highlighting both the promise and the limits of node-level cross-model circuit alignment.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/jasonshaoshun/dfa-circuits.
2604.24302.paper_summary_zh: 機械解釋性使得能夠定位語言模型中基於特定行為的電路，但現有的方法成本高昂、模型特定且難以擴展到更大的架構。我們介紹了\textbf{可微分的忠實性對齊 (DFA)}，這是一個通過學習的可微分對齊將電路信息從較小的源模型轉移到較大的目標模型的框架。DFA將源模型的節點重要性分數投影到目標模型中，並使用柔性忠實性目標訓練這一映射，避免在目標模型上進行完整的電路發現。我們在Llama-3和Qwen-2.5上評估DFA，涵蓋六個任務，包括事實檢索、多選推理和算術。最強的結果出現在Llama-3 $1$B$\rightarrow3$B上，其中對齊電路通常與直接節點歸因相競爭，且零樣本轉移仍然有效。對於較大的源-目標差距，恢復能力減弱，且在Qwen-2.5上顯著較低，這表明隨著架構和擴展差異的增加，轉移變得更加困難。總體而言，DFA始終優於簡單的基準，在某些情況下，恢復的目標模型電路的忠實性可與直接歸因相媲美或更強。這些結果表明，較小的模型可以為較大的模型提供有用的機械先驗，同時突顯了節點級跨模型電路對齊的潛力和局限性。\footnote{代碼可在 https://github.com/jasonshaoshun/dfa-circuits 獲得。
2604.24302.author: Shun Shao et.al.
2604.24302.authors: Shun Shao, Binxu Wang, Shay B. Cohen, Anna Korhonen, Yonatan Belinkov
